items.title: Oracle is under pressure from more than $100 billion in debt and massive layoffs as it pushes ahead with Larry Ellison’s 3-step transformation
items.description: The Larry Ellison-led software giant is remaking its cloud infrastructure to rival Amazon and Microsoft.

items.title: Prediction: The Artificial Intelligence (AI) Pick-and-Shovel Trade Isn't Over. Here Are 2 Stocks to Buy for 2026
items.description: Artificial intelligence spending is only going up across the whole of the tech industry. These two companies stand to benefit from all of it.

items.title: 3 Reasons Investors Love Synchrony Financial (SYF)
items.description: Over the past six months, Synchrony Financial’s stock price fell to $66.59. Shareholders have lost 12.5% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 4.8%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

items.title: Stock Market Today, March 9: Amazon Edges Higher on Zoox Robotaxi Expansion
items.description: Zoox's robotaxi rollout and delivery network spotlight Amazon’s evolving logistics and AI strategy, today, March 9, 2026.

items.title: Oracle to report Q3 earnings as Wall Street questions AI spending
items.description: Oracle will report its Q3 earnings after the bell on Tuesday.
